figures.caption: Figure 2: Violin plots of ACPA scores for trio offspring. The left half of each plot shows the ACPA scores for trio offspring when using the method of Noto et. al. while the right part of each violin shows ACPA scores using our method. The bottom plot shows results when input data has no within-chromosome phasing errors, while the top plot shows results when within-chromosome phasing errors are present. For each focal individual, color indicates the highest degree of relatedness (based on π̂) to any non-focal individual.
